zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wakeman於1523年出生在英國武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特時，他的父親Roger Wakeman20歲，母親Joan Haselwood21歲。他於1545年8月9日與Joan Spencer Beaucamp在英國武斯特斯爾貝德利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1581年11月30日在英國武斯特斯爾利斯福德享年58歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾海萊左文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wakeman于1523年出生在英国武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特时，他的父亲Roger Wakeman20岁，母亲Joan Haselwood21岁。他于1545年8月9日与Joan Spencer Beaucamp在英国武斯特斯爾貝德利结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1581年11月30日在英国武斯特斯爾利斯福德享年58岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾海萊左文。

nameMeanings.name: Wakeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English wakeman ‘watchman, town guard’, also ‘municipal officer responsible for night-time security and the town musicians’. Wakeman was the title of the chief magistrate of the borough of Ripon until 1604, when it was changed to mayor. He was the head of the body of wakemen whose duty was to blow a cow's horn every night at nine o'clock. If between then and sunrise any burglary took place, it was made good at the public charge. See also Watchman .

variants.name: Watchman
meanings: Native American (Navajo): from English watchman, probably used as a translation of a Navajo term for this occupation, ha'asídí.
English and Scottish: occupational name from Middle English waccheman ‘watchman, guard, sentry’, also used as a nickname for a person characterised by wakefulness. Compare Wakeman .

variants.name: Watchorn
meanings: English (East Midlands, especially Leicestershire): nickname apparently from Middle English wache ‘vigil, wake, watch’ (Old English wacce) + horn ‘horn’. Compare the discussion of Wakeman .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wakeman was born in 1523, in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, his father, Roger Wakeman, was 20 and his mother, Joan Haselwood, was 21. He married Joan Spencer Beaucamp on 9 August 1545, in Bewdley, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 30 November 1581, in Ribbesford, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Halesowen, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wakeman est né en 1523, à Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Wakeman, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Haselwood, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joan Spencer Beaucamp le 9 août 1545, à Bewdley, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 30 novembre 1581, à Ribbesford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Halesowen, Shropshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wakemanが1523年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアチャッドエスリー コルベットで生まれた時，父Roger Wakemanは20歳，母Joan Haselwoodは21歳であった。1545年8月9日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベウドリーでJoan Spencer Beaucampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1581年11月30日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアリベスフォードで58歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアヘイレソウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wakeman(이)가 1523년 영국 워스스터실르 채데슬리 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Wakeman(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Haselwood(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1545년 8월 9일 영국 워스스터실르 브w들리에서 Joan Spencer Beaucamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1581년 11월 30일 영국 워스스터실르 리브베스퍼드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 헤일소웬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wakeman nasceu em 1523, em Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Wakeman, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan Haselwood, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Spencer Beaucamp em 9 de agosto de 1545, em Bewdley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1581, em Ribbesford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Halesowen, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wakeman родился в 1523 г. в местности чэддесли корбетт, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Wakeman было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Haselwood, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Spencer Beaucamp 9 августа 1545 г. в местности бюдли, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 30 ноября 1581 г. в местности риббесфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности хэлесоуэн, шропшир, Англия.
